title: Improve Knowledge tab reader with vivid syntax highlighting

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
comments.content: Plan: enhance render_markdown_lines() and the metadata header in the reader view with richer colors. Specific improvements: (1) YAML frontmatter metadata — colored labels, Magenta tags, Cyan sources, Green contributors. (2) Markdown body — Yellow for H1, Cyan for H2, numbered lists support, inline code backticks in DarkGray bg, horizontal rules as box-drawing chars, bold/italic detection for **text** and *text*. (3) Code blocks — add language label in Cyan at the opening fence.
